title: No auth on MCP HTTP server
description: HTTP transport binds to localhost but has no per-client auth tokens. Relies on localhost binding as sole safety mechanism. Insufficient for team/home-lab use.

title: store.ts monolith (4673 lines)
description: Single file contains store creation, indexing, chunking, search, embedding, and maintenance logic. Would benefit from splitting into modules.

title: No code coverage reporting
description: Vitest runs all tests but no coverage threshold, no codecov upload, no coverage visualization in CI. 0.92 test-to-source ratio by LOC but unknown branch/line coverage.

title: No explanation trace for reranker decisions
description: LLM reranker returns yes/no + logprobs but no reasoning. --explain flag shows RRF scores but not why reranker downranked specific results. Hard to debug unexpected results.

title: No Dependabot/dependency scanning
description: Dependencies are pinned but no automated scanning for CVEs or updates. Release skill includes manual 'pnpm outdated' check but not automated.

title: No retrieval feedback loop
description: No user-feedback-driven reranking. For personal knowledge base where user knows which results were right, this is a gap. Static quality only.

title: English-centric by default
description: Default embedding model (embeddinggemma-300M) is English-only. Multilingual via QMD_EMBED_MODEL but requires full re-index. CJK users get worse default experience.

title: No CONTRIBUTING.md
description: No explicit contribution guide despite 25+ community PRs per release. Contributors figure it out from README + CHANGELOG patterns.
